name.description: The name of the cluster, unique within the project and location.

cluster.description: The cluster to create the node pool for. Cluster must be present in location provided for zonal clusters.

node_count.description: The number of nodes per instance group. This field can be used to update the number of nodes per instance group but should not be used alongside autoscaling.

service_account.description: The Google Cloud Platform Service Account to be used by the node VMs created by GKE Autopilot or NAP.

management.description: Node management configuration, wherein auto-repair and auto-upgrade is configured.
